_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: tick audit — USDCAD zone stale (price broke to 1.3646, 60p below entry), OIL disbelieving blockade (87.28 falling despite day-4 blockade) — added downside breakdown

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest of 0.707 from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed regime. Currently 100p+ above at 0.7172 with bull BOS — needs regime shift.
DOUBLE TAILWIND: MoF intervention red line 160.00 + risk-off yen safe-haven bid from US-Iran escalation. Short on entry. Thesis STRONGER under blockade regime.
Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight confirmed. Short on retest from below (no intervention needed — pure flow). Price 158.67, 17p away. H1+M15 bearish BOS/ChoCh stacked — imminent.

WTI >$90 = blockade priced harder. Currently 87.28 with H1 bear trend — market DISBELIEVING blockade on day 4. A recovery to $90 requires fresh catalyst (tanker hit, Iran retaliation kinetic). Entry still valid on break-retest. Conv lowered to 2-3.

NEW: break below 85.00 = oil definitively rejecting blockade risk premium (prior bear BOS at 85.161 untested). Short on retest from below. SL 86.50, TP 82.50. Thesis: supply ample, market calls Iran's bluff. Conv 3.
Safe-haven long on pullback into zone. Price 4808 IN zone. Needs rejection wick + M15 bullish BOS confirmation before entry. SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 3-4.
Psych level — exit zone for any gold longs; profit-take / partial. Not an entry.
